title: Steamed Mushrooms with Garlic and Herbs
description: A simple and flavorful French dish made with tender mushrooms, garlic, and herbs, steamed to perfection.
instructions: Rinse the mushrooms under cold water and pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chopped thyme and cook for another minute.
Place the mushrooms in a steamer basket and steam them over boiling water for 3-4 minutes.
Season the mushrooms with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the steamed mushrooms hot, topped with the garlic and herb butter.
